title: Bridge Paper: Altered dorsal anterior insula functional connectivity underlying abnormal interoceptive accuracy awareness in migraine without aura.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
**Phase context:** interoception, interoceptive, heart-brain, vagal, insula, cardiorespiratory, breathing entrainment

Paper: Altered dorsal anterior insula functional connectivity underlying abnormal interoceptive accuracy awareness in migraine without aura.
DOI: 10.1186/s10194-026-02318-x
Abstract: BACKGROUND: Abnormal interoception is increasingly recognized as a key feature of migraine. The dorsal anterior insula (dAI) is hypothesized to play a central role in interoceptive processing, yet the neural mechanisms underlying this abnormality remain unclear. We aimed to investigate interoceptive disturbances in migraine and to clarify the role of insula dysfunction, specifically dAI functional connectivity, in underlying these interoceptive alterations and potentially contributing to the pat
